title: EC Advanced Netherite Compat
description: adds compatability between Expanded Combat and Advanced Netherite
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-advanced-netherite-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Advanced Netherite Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c17011594dde1f9d3690111b91c554b02250933.gif)](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite). ### adds support for: Netherite-Iron - weapons, quivers, and gauntlets \ Netherite-Gold - weapons, quivers, and gauntlets \ Netherite-Emerald - weapons, quivers, and gauntlets \ Netherite-Diamond - weapons, quivers, and gauntlets \ \ Click the banner to get the discount:
